care.summary: Graceful drooping branches with small glossy leaves; sensitive to environmental changes and drops leaves easily when stressed.
care.light: Bright indirect light; tolerates some morning sun
care.water: Keep evenly moist; let top inch dry between waterings
care.fertilizer: Monthly balanced liquid feed in spring/summer
common_issues: Leaf drop from overwatering, drafts, or location change
Scale insects on stems and leaves
tips: Keep in one spot once settled — hates being moved
Wipe leaves monthly to prevent dust buildup
Avoid cold drafts and sudden temperature changes
